title: Devil Dao Sect
content:
Devil Dao Sect
 is one of the 
Nine Sects and Thirteen Factions
 located on the 
Green Devil Continent
 inside the 
Eastern Continent
 on the 
Immortal Astral Continent
.

History
[
]

Book Twelve
[
]

The Green Devil Continent's Three Great Sects, Devil Dao Sect, 
Poison Devil Sect
, and 
Wu Ji Sect
 (author literally added a "Devil Restriction Sect" afterwards so idk which of these 4 are the 3 great sects XD), initiated war against the 
Heavenly Bull Continent
. They planned to revert the half Celestial Pill that created the Pill Sea back into a pill and use it to break the barrier dividing the two continents. To this end, they sent 
Void Cloud
, one of the Eastern Continent's Four Geniuses, there to refine the sea back into the pill and break the barrier as it would also allow his reputation to skyrocket and allow him to enter the 
Celestial Imperial Capital
 in the 
Central Continent
 to obtain the qualification to enter the ancestral temple.

Void Cloud planned to explode the pill close to the Heavenly Bull Continent which would immediately destroy the barrier around it and disintegrate much of the continent. However, 
Wang Lin
's interference resulted in the pill exploding right in the middle of the two continents and, thus, damaged both continents. 

Still, it managed to destroy the barrier around the Heavenly Bull Continent and so the Green Devil Continent's Three Great Sects marched their millions of cultivators towards the Heavenly Bull Continent. They also sent advance parties filled with a few dozen 
Void Tribulant
 cultivators and mostly Third Step or 
Heaven's Blight
 cultivators.
